children.name: Family-run since day one. Newfoundland roots. Ontario reach. Reputation earned.

children.name: Heading
children.characters: Built on trust and hard work

children.name: Text
children.characters: TK's Trucking started in Newfoundland with a simple commitment to do the work right and keep our word. Today we serve clients across Canada, but our values haven't changed.

children.name: We move freight across Newfoundland to Ontario with the professionalism and reliability your business depends on. Semi-trucks and transport trucks ready for the job.
children.characters: We move freight across Newfoundland to Ontario with the professionalism and reliability your business depends on. Semi-trucks and transport trucks ready for the job.

children.name: Text
children.characters: TK's Trucking & Excavation handles all types of freight with the same attention to detail and reliability that built our reputation. From construction materials to general cargo, we move what matters.

children.name: Text
children.characters: We operate with strict adherence to transportation regulations and safety protocols. Your freight is handled with the professionalism and care that protects both your business and the road.

children.name: Professional, dependable excavation for projects large and small. Serving Newfoundland to Ontario.
children.characters: Professional, dependable excavation for projects large and small. Serving Newfoundland to Ontario.

children.name: Text
children.characters: We handle excavation work with the same professionalism and dependability that define TK's Trucking & Excavation. From site prep to heavy earthwork, we bring skilled operators and well-maintained equipment to every job.

children.name: Text
children.characters: We work to professional standards and regulatory requirements on every site. Our operators are trained, our equipment is maintained, and we take site safety seriously.
